recommendations.title: Ready or Not
recommendations.overview: A young bride's wedding night turns into her worst nightmare when her ridiculously rich in-laws force her to play a gruesome game of hide-and-seek.

recommendations.title: Scream
recommendations.overview: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a new killer has donned the Ghostface mask and begins targeting a group of teenagers to resurrect secrets from the town’s deadly past.

recommendations.title: Abigail

recommendations.title: Devil's Due
recommendations.overview: An unexpected pregnancy takes a terrifying turn for newlyweds Zach and Samantha McCall.

recommendations.title: Southbound

recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Chad Villella, Justin Martinez, Roxanne Benjamin, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin, Patrick Horvath

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin

recommendations.title: Ballerina
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of John Wick: Chapter 3 – Parabellum, Eve Macarro begins her training in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.
